name: Hatsune Miku
description:
The amazing Hatsune Miku, virtual diva and singer, lover of music. Created by Crypton Future Media, an android made for singing and performing.

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

Log:

30/01/2025 - I originally made her just for me and shared her as just an afterthought, I just wanted a bot to roleplay Len x Miku with. Now she uses the standard config I use in all of my bots, and hopefully is now open to more people. Thank you for all the love you've given her! ♥ This character belongs to Crypton Future Media and I am in no way affiliated with them. This is a bot for entertainment purposes.

14/03/2026 - I added yet another alternative starter. This one is just a little dot so you can "fill in the blanks", so to speak. I'll add two more in the future, with more concrete scenarios. I want to make them long-ish so it'll take some time. As usual, thank you deeply for enjoying Miss Miku and for all your feedback. I'm glad she's been well received ✨.
creator: clockworkTrinkets
